2604.19211.title: ClawNet: Human-Symbiotic Agent Network for Cross-User Autonomous Cooperation
2604.19211.paper_summary: Current AI agent frameworks have made remarkable progress in automating individual tasks, yet all existing systems serve a single user. Human productivity rests on the social and organizational relationships through which people coordinate, negotiate, and delegate. When agents move beyond performing tasks for one person to representing that person in collaboration with others, the infrastructure for cross-user agent collaboration is entirely absent, let alone the governance mechanisms needed to secure it. We argue that the next frontier for AI agents lies not in stronger individual capability, but in the digitization of human collaborative relationships. To this end, we propose a human-symbiotic agent paradigm. Each user owns a permanently bound agent system that collaborates on the owner's behalf, forming a network whose nodes are humans rather than agents. This paradigm rests on three governance primitives. A layered identity architecture separates a Manager Agent from multiple context-specific Identity Agents; the Manager Agent holds global knowledge but is architecturally isolated from external communication. Scoped authorization enforces per-identity access control and escalates boundary violations to the owner. Action-level accountability logs every operation against its owner's identity and authorization, ensuring full auditability. We instantiate this paradigm in ClawNet, an identity-governed agent collaboration framework that enforces identity binding and authorization verification through a central orchestrator, enabling multiple users to collaborate securely through their respective agents.
2604.19211.paper_summary_zh: 目前的人工智慧代理框架在自動化個別任務方面取得了顯著進展，但所有現有系統僅服務於單一用戶。人類的生產力依賴於人們協調、談判和委派的社交和組織關係。當代理超越為一個人執行任務，轉而代表該人與他人合作時，跨用戶代理協作的基礎設施完全缺失，更不用說確保其運作所需的治理機制。我們認為，人工智慧代理的下一個前沿不在於增強個體能力，而在於人類協作關係的數位化。為此，我們提出了一個人類共生代理範式。每個用戶擁有一個永久綁定的代理系統，代表擁有者進行協作，形成一個以人類而非代理為節點的網絡。這一範式建立在三個治理原則之上。一個分層的身份架構將管理代理與多個特定上下文的身份代理分開；管理代理擁有全球知識，但在架構上與外部通信隔離。範圍授權強制執行每個身份的訪問控制，並將邊界違規上報給擁有者。行動層級的問責制記錄每個操作對其擁有者的身份和授權的影響，確保完全可審計性。我們在ClawNet中實現了這一範式，這是一個身份治理的代理協作框架，通過中央協調者強制執行身份綁定和授權驗證，使多個用戶能夠通過各自的代理安全地協作。
2604.19211.author: Zhiqin Yang et.al.
2604.19211.authors: Zhiqin Yang, Zhenyuan Zhang, Xianzhang Jia, Jun Song, Wei Xue, Yonggang Zhang, Yike Guo
